latestArticles.description: The Trump administration is weighing declaring Brazil’s two largest drug gangs terrorist groups, after lobbying by the sons of jailed former President Jair Bolsonaro.

latestArticles.title: Asda boss rejects profiteering claims as petrol price tops 150p
latestArticles.description: Motorists are facing higher fuel prices ahead of Easter break due to the conflict in the Middle East, the RAC says.

latestArticles.title: Russian man who assaulted woman during Barron Trump FaceTime call sentenced to 4 years
latestArticles.description: Russian MMA fighter Matvei Rumiantsev was sentenced to four years for assaulting a woman in London in an attack Barron Trump witnessed on FaceTime.
